tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def unresolved-sentry (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"}))
(def hot-services 
  (->> unresolved-sentry
       (group-by :project)
       (filter (fn [[service issues]] (> (count issues) 5)))
       (map (fn [[service issues]] {:service service :count (count issues)}))))
hot-services"}

{"code":"(def triggered-incidents (pagerduty_incidents {:status "triggered"}))
(def hot-service-names (set (map :service hot-services)))
(def hot-incidents 
  (filter #(contains? hot-service-names (:service %)) triggered-incidents))
(println "Triggered incidents:" (count triggered-incidents))
(println "Hot incidents:" (count hot-incidents))
hot-incidents"}
